zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD价格位于$1.34741附近，略低于20日简单移动均线SMA(20)的$1.35737，显示短期均线压力较强，多头动能受限。MACD数值为0.000133，虽然略高于零轴，但缺少信号线对比，表明市场动量偏中性，尚未形成明确趋势突破。

价格波动范围较窄，24小时高低点在$1.35538和$1.3472之间，显示市场短线多空力量相对均衡。若价格进一步跌破$1.3470，可能测试下方支撑$1.3400；反之，上方阻力位于$1.3575至$1.3600区间，突破该区间则有望重新激活多头行情。

技术指标方面，RSI数据缺失，但结合MACD及价格与SMA(20)关系，可判断市场整体偏向整理震荡，短线反弹有限。交易者应关注关键支撑和阻力位置，谨慎操作，避免追涨杀跌。

交易策略上，建议以区间操作为主，低位接近支撑可尝试小幅建仓，高位靠近阻力则适宜获利了结。风险控制应紧密，设置止损在支撑下方约0.005至0.007美元范围，以防突发下行压力造成损失。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading near 1.34741, showing mild bearish pressure after a 0.53% daily decline. Price action remains below the 20-period SMA at 1.35737, indicating short-term momentum favors sellers. The narrow trading range between 1.35538 and 1.34720 suggests consolidation, but the inability to reclaim the moving average keeps the near-term bias cautiously negative unless buyers regain control above recent highs.

Momentum indicators offer a mixed but restrained outlook. The MACD reading of 0.000133 remains marginally positive, hinting that downside momentum is not accelerating aggressively, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation. With RSI data unavailable, traders may rely more heavily on price structure and moving averages. A sustained move below the session low could strengthen bearish sentiment, while stabilization above current levels may encourage range trading.

Immediate support is forming around 1.34720, a level that has already been tested intraday. A decisive breakdown could expose the 1.3400 region as the next psychological and technical target. On the upside, resistance stands near 1.35538, followed by the SMA zone around 1.35737. A breakout above these barriers would improve short-term structure and potentially shift momentum back toward buyers.

Short-term traders may consider a cautious sell-on-rallies approach while price remains under the 20-period SMA, using tight risk controls near resistance. More aggressive bullish positioning may be better reserved for a confirmed move above 1.35737 with improving momentum confirmation. For range traders, buying near support and trimming exposure near resistance could remain viable until a clearer directional breakout emerges.
